scripts.check: bun run check:types && bun run check:lint && bun run test && bun run pack:core && bun run pack:rules && bun run pack:eslint && bun run pack:timestamps && bun run pack:soft-delete && bun run pack:zod
scripts.check:lint: bunx @biomejs/biome check packages/core packages/rules packages/eslint packages/timestamps packages/soft-delete packages/zod benchmark .github
scripts.bench:all: bun run benchmark/time.ts && bun run benchmark/full.ts && bun run benchmark/memory.ts
scripts.pack:core: bun run build:core && cd packages/core && npm pack --dry-run
scripts.pack:eslint: bun run build:eslint && cd packages/eslint && npm pack --dry-run
scripts.pack:rules: bun run build:rules && cd packages/rules && npm pack --dry-run
scripts.pack:timestamps: bun run build:timestamps && cd packages/timestamps && npm pack --dry-run
scripts.pack:soft-delete: bun run build:soft-delete && cd packages/soft-delete && npm pack --dry-run
scripts.pack:zod: bun run build:zod && cd packages/zod && npm pack --dry-run
scripts.test: bun test packages/core/tests packages/rules/tests packages/eslint/tests packages/timestamps/tests packages/soft-delete/tests packages/zod/tests
scripts.bench:jsonb: DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL:?DATABASE_URL is required} bun run benchmark/jsonb.ts
